structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Chesapeake Bay and Virginia Waters Clean-Up and Oversight Act

law.catch_line: Development of an impaired waters clean-up plan; strategies; objectives

text.section: The Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources shall develop a plan for the cleanup of the Chesapeake Bay and Virginia's waters designated as impaired by the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency. The plan shall be revised and amended as needed to reflect changes in strategies, timetables, and milestones. Upon the request of the Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources, state agencies shall participate in the development of the plan.
